creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
> Open issue cant block a closed issue, add to See Also instead

That's how regressions were tracked[1] on bugzilla.mozilla.org until they've introduced a separate field to avoid ambiguity. See also bug 203179.

[1] https://mozilla.github.io/bug-handling/regressions
